summary: Completed testing of critical production bugfixes. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verification confirms both fixes working: 1) /tiles/:slug route renders TileDetailPage correctly (not redirecting to homepage), 2) Collection Organizer assign/unassign/bulk-assign endpoints update BOTH supplier_products AND tiles collections. Category query now uses $or with sub_categories check to find products assigned via Collection Organizer.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Plus39 supplier data with 4 series (Travertine, Burlington, Artisan, Moonlight) and LEPORCE tiles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production bugfixes fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Backend tiles.py category query (lines 350-395) now uses $or with sub_categories regex check - products assigned via Collection Organizer will appear in category pages. 2) Backend website_admin.py assign/unassign/bulk-assign endpoints now use broad matching (supplier_name regex + series/name) to update tiles collection. 3) Frontend App.js has /tiles/:slug route that renders TileDetailPage. Test data: Plus39 has 4 series in supplier_products, LEPORCE has ~556 tiles. Cleanup: All test assignments were cleaned up after testing.

backend: POST /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/assign - updates tiles collection (tiles_updated field in response)
GET /api/tiles/collections - returns collections without category filter
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=Plus39 - returns series with product_names, relevant_groups, ungrouped_count
GET /api/website-admin/collection-organizer/series?supplier=LEPORCE - returns empty series without crash
Tile matching uses broad conditions: supplier_name regex + series, supplier_name regex + name containing series, source_supplier regex + series
frontend: /tiles/:slug route renders TileDetailPage (not redirecting to homepage)
Product detail page shows: product name, SKU, pricing table, specifications, stock status, Add to Cart button
Sitemap shows Categories section with Floor Tiles and Wall Tiles
Collections Hub accessible at /admin/collections with Collection Mapping tab

bug_1_category_query.description: Products assigned via Collection Organizer don't show on customer-facing category pages
bug_1_category_query.root_cause: Category query only checked hardcoded attribute mappings (e.g., attributes.type='floor') but not sub_categories field
bug_1_category_query.fix: Added $or condition with sub_categories regex check in tiles.py lines 370-391
bug_1_category_query.evidence: Backend tests pass - assign endpoint returns tiles_updated count, category query structure verified

bug_2_tiles_collection_update.description: Tiles collection not updated when assigning via Collection Organizer
bug_2_tiles_collection_update.root_cause: Assign endpoint was matching tiles by sku/slug/name which often didn't match
bug_2_tiles_collection_update.fix: Now uses supplier_name+series matching with broad conditions in website_admin.py
bug_2_tiles_collection_update.evidence: Assign response includes tiles_updated field, unassign and bulk-assign also update tiles

bug_3_search_redirect.description: Searching for a product shows it in dropdown, but clicking it redirects to homepage
bug_3_search_redirect.root_cause: Search links to /tiles/:slug but that route didn't exist - only /shop/tiles/:slug did
bug_3_search_redirect.fix: Added /tiles/:slug route in App.js that renders TileDetailPage
bug_3_search_redirect.evidence: Navigating to /tiles/opaco-60x120cm renders product detail page with name, price, specs, Add to Cart
